title: Cleanup & Review
description: Tidy up your desktop and celebrate everything you've learned! You've earned your penguin badge. 🐧

steps.instruction: Open the Files app from the dock and navigate to the Desktop.
steps.hint: Click the Files icon (📁) in the dock, then click 'Desktop' in the sidebar.

steps.instruction: Right-click on the todo.txt file and select 'Move to Trash' to clean up.
steps.hint: Right-click on todo.txt, then click 'Move to Trash'.

steps.instruction: Now open the Terminal (Ctrl+Alt+T) for one final command!
steps.hint: Press Ctrl+Alt+T to open the Terminal.

steps.instruction: Create your graduation file! Type: touch Desktop/i-know-linux.txt
🎉 Congratulations! Type: echo 'I am a Linux penguin!' — to celebrate your graduation!
steps.hint: Type: echo 'I am a Linux penguin!' and press Enter.
